content:
<!-- type: state-machine lang: mermaid -->

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Detecting: jet install

    Detecting --> SingleInstall: WorkspaceMode::Single
    Detecting --> WorkspaceInstall: WorkspaceMode::Jet

    state WorkspaceInstall {
        [*] --> Ordering
        Ordering --> ProcessingPackages: topological_order() complete

        state ProcessingPackages {
            [*] --> ClassifyingDep

            ClassifyingDep --> Symlinking: workspace: protocol
            ClassifyingDep --> Downloading: external dep

            Symlinking --> RecordingWorkspace: relative symlink created
            Downloading --> RecordingExternal: hardlink into node_modules

            RecordingWorkspace --> ClassifyingDep: more deps
            RecordingExternal --> ClassifyingDep: more deps

            RecordingWorkspace --> [*]: package done
            RecordingExternal --> [*]: package done
        }

        ProcessingPackages --> ProcessingPackages: next package in topological order
        ProcessingPackages --> CommittingLockfile: all packages processed
        CommittingLockfile --> [*]
    }

    SingleInstall --> [*]: jet-lock.yaml written
```
